title: Events — Darren Jones MP
h1: Open Q&A town hall with Darren Jones MP
text_excerpt: Events — Darren Jones MP 0 Skip to Content Darren Jones MP Ask for help Policy questions For schools Events About me About Bristol North West Contact Subscribe to mailing list > Open Menu Close Menu Darren Jones MP Ask for help Policy questions For schools Events About me About Bristol North West Contact Subscribe to mailing list > Open Menu Close Menu Ask for help Policy questions For schools Events About me About Bristol North West Contact Subscribe to mailing list > Upcoming events. Book one of the events below or subscribe to my newsletter to be among the first to hear when a new event is added. Apr 25 Open Q&A town hall with Darren Jones MP Saturday, April 25, 2026 2:00 PM 3:30 PM Google Calendar ICS There’s no set theme for this town hall – come and ask your local MP a question about any local or national issue. Whether you have a burning question on your mind, or you want to come along and hear what other people ask, I'd love to see you at my Open Q&A town hall. The event will be held in the BS11 area, but it is open to everyone in my Bristol North West constituency. Important: This event is only for people who live in Bristol North West. You can check if your address is in the Bristol North West constituency here . For security reasons, the venue details will only be shared with attendees 24 hours before the event. The venue will be in the BS11 area. The venue is wheelchair accessible. Book now > Book now > View Event → Feb 28 Open Q&A town hall with Darren Jones MP Saturday, February 28, 2026 2:00 PM 3:30 PM Google Calendar ICS There’s no set theme for this town hall – come and ask your local MP a question about any local or national issue. Whether you have a burning question that you would like to ask me, or you want to come along and hear what other people ask, I'd love to see you at my Open Q&A town hall. The event will be held in the BS7 area, but it is open to everyone in my Bristol North West constituency. Important: This event is only for people who live in Bristol North West. You can check if your address is in the Bristol North West constituency here . For security reasons, the venue details will only be shared with attendees 24 hours before the event. The venue will be in the BS7 area. The venue is wheelchair accessible. Book now > Book now > View Event → Jan 24 Darren Jones MP in conversation with Ed Winters Saturday, January 24, 2026 3:30 PM 5:00 PM Google Calendar ICS Book now > Book now > Join me for this special constituency event where I’ll be chatting with Ed Winters about veganism and animal welfare. Ed is a best-selling author, vegan educator, and host of The Disclosure Podcast . He has just released his latest book, How To Go (and stay) Vegan. There is much to discuss at this event, including the publication last month of this government’s Animal Welfare Strategy , which sets out our priorities for improving animal welfare, and the steps needed to deliver them. Important: This event is only for people who live in Bristol North West. You can check if your address is in the Bristol North West constituency here . For security reasons, the venue details will only be shared with attendees 24 hours before the event. The venue will be in the BS9 area. The venue is wheelchair accessible. View Event → Dec 13 Winter Social with Darren Jones MP Saturday, December 13, 2025 3:00 PM 4:30 PM Google Calendar ICS There's no agenda or Q&A at this informal event, just some mince pies and and hot drinks (or something stronger if you want to buy a drink at the bar), and the opportunity to chat with me without the stage, microphones or large audience. This will be a smaller event than my town halls to give me the opportunity to move around the room and speak to constituents in smaller groups. I'll need to be a good host and try to chat with everyone, so please don't keep me talking too long!
